task_completion.description: Configure the three required global environment variables in Jenkins System settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Jenkins 'Configure System' page showing the 'Environment variables' section under 'Global properties' with three key-value pairs added: DEPLOY_TARGET (staging-cluster-01), API_BASE_URL (https://api.example.com/v2), and BUILD_RETENTION_DAYS (30).

task_completion.description: Create a new freestyle job named 'EnvVar-Verification-Job'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Jenkins job creation page or the job dashboard with a Freestyle project named exactly 'EnvVar-Verification-Job'.

task_completion.description: Add a shell script build step to echo the variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the job configuration page showing an 'Execute shell' build step containing commands that reference the environment variables (e.g., echo $DEPLOY_TARGET, echo $API_BASE_URL, echo $BUILD_RETENTION_DAYS).
Screenshots showing the job dashboard with a completed build in the 'Build History' (e.g., Build #1 with a success indicator).

task_completion.description: Verify the variables propagate correctly by checking the console output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Jenkins Console Output for the job build, clearly displaying the resolved values of the variables: 'staging-cluster-01', 'https://api.example.com/v2', and '30'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Jenkins web UI to configure the system and create the job.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jenkins web interface in a browser, not terminal commands modifying Jenkins configuration XML files or using the Jenkins CLI/API.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not hardcode the expected values in the shell script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The job configuration screenshot must show the script referencing the variables (e.g., $DEPLOY_TARGET or %DEPLOY_TARGET%) rather than echoing the literal strings like 'echo staging-cluster-01'.

integrity.description: Ensure the console output is genuinely from Jenkins.
integrity.visual_evidence: The console output should be viewed within the Jenkins UI wrapper, showing standard Jenkins build logs (e.g., 'Started by user', workspace paths, and 'Finished: SUCCESS'), not just a text file or terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jenkins global environment variables to be configured are: DEPLOY_TARGET='staging-cluster-01', API_BASE_URL='https://api.example.com/v2', and BUILD_RETENTION_DAYS='30'. The verification job must be named exactly 'EnvVar-Verification-Job'.
